meaning: vt.使安乐死,对...施无痛致死术
examples: An animal shelter was threatening to euthanize it if his owner did not come back.
We love animals, yet we euthanize five million abandoned cats and dogs each year.
But the point is, I want to ask seriously and calmly: do you euthanize your family?
He doesn't want to have to feed the polar bears, much less euthanize them.
The Indiana Department of Natural Resources wanted to euthanize Dani, saying she might be dangerous and a threat to people.
